text:
[Insert other recitals]

Agreements

By their Form ARB1CS the parties have agreed to refer to arbitration the issues described in it which include some or all of the orders for which applications are pending in this court.

[Insert other agreements]

THE COURT ORDERS [BY CONSENT] / [SAVE AS TO PARAGRAPHS [PARA NUMBERS]]

The respondent shall comply with the peremptory order by no later than [date].

A penal notice is endorsed on paragraph [para number] of this order.

[Insert other orders]

(if applied for) Permission to appeal against this decision is [granted] / [refused].

[Insert provision for the costs of the application]

Dated [date]

Order

The Family Procedure Rules 2010 rules 3.2 and 3.3 | Order
